title: Hair styling device
abstract: The present invention discloses a hair styling device (10, 20) comprising an inner cylindrical shell (121, 221) provided with through-holes; a rotatable cylindrical shell (122, 222) surrounding the inner cylindrical shell (121, 221); a drive assembly (123, 223) for driving the rotatable cylindrical shell (122, 222) to rotate around the inner cylindrical shell (121, 221) for winding hair around the inner cylindrical shell (121, 221); and a wind supply assembly (130, 230) for supplying hot air to any hair wound around the inner cylindrical shell (121, 221) through the through-holes. According to the present invention, hot air is supplied to the hair wound around the inner cylindrical shell (121, 221) so that the hair is heated evenly and shaped.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS: 1. A hair styling device (10, 20), comprising: an inner cylindrical shell (121, 221) provided with through-holes ; a rotatable cylindrical shell (122, 222) surrounding the inner cylindrical shell (121, 221); a drive assembly (123, 223) for driving the rotatable cylindrical shell (122, 222) to rotate around the inner cylindrical shell (121, 221) for winding hair around the inner cylindrical shell (121, 221); and a wind supply assembly (130, 230) for supplying hot air to every hair wound around the inner cylindrical shell (121, 221) through the through-holes. 2. The hair styling device according to claim 1, wherein the inner cylindrical shell (121, 221) is fixed inside a top casing (112, 212), the top casing (112, 212) having a hair inlet (113, 213) formed thereon and an air outlet (115, 215) formed at a top thereof. 3. The hair styling device according to claim 2, wherein a wind shield (215 a) is provided above the air outlet (215) for guiding the hot air toward two sides of the wind shield (215a). 4. The hair styling device according to claim 3, wherein the air outlet (115, 215) is a cambered hole; and the wind shield (215a) is a corresponding cambered plate for guiding the hot air toward an inside edge and an outside edge of the cambered plate. 5. The hair styling device according to any one of claims 2-4, further comprising a handle (11 1, 21 1) connected to the top casing (112, 212), an air inlet (114) formed at a bottom of the handle (111, 21 1). 6. The hair styling device according to claim 5, wherein an air guiding element (224) is disposed at a bottom of the inner cylindrical shell (221), the air guiding element (224) comprising a top opening fixed at the bottom of the inner cylindrical shell (221) and a bottom opening with a diameter bigger than that of the top opening and facing towards an outlet of a wind channel of the handle (111, 211) directly. 7. The hair styling device according to claim 1, wherein the rotatable cylindrical shell (122, 222) has at least an upward notch (122a, 122b, 222a, 222b) formed thereon and at least a hooked structure (122c, 122d, 222c, 222d) formed at a side of the upward notch (122a, 122b, 222a, 222b) and bending towards the upward notch (122a, 122b, 222a, 222b). 8. The hair styling device according to claim 6 or 7, wherein at least an elastic strip (222e) made of heat resisting elastic material is disposed on an inner wall of the rotatable cylindrical shell (222) along a longitudinal direction thereof and extends towards the inner cylindrical shell (221) for applying pressure onto the hair wound around the inner cylindrical shell (221). 9. The hair styling device according to claim 2, wherein a circular flange (222f) is formed on an outside surface of a lower portion of the rotatable cylindrical shell (222); and the lower portion of the rotatable cylindrical shell (222) 

 is installed at the bottom of the top casing (212) and is rotatable relative to the top casing (212) by means of a ring part (218) cooperating with the circular flange (222f). 10. The hair styling device according to claim 2, wherein the top casing (212) comprises an upper body (212a) and a lower body (212b), and at least a locking element (214) is provided at a bottom edge of the upper body (212a) and at least a corresponding groove (215) is provided at a top edge of the lower body (212b), the upper body (212a) and the lower body (212b) being assembled together by cooperation of the locking element (214) and the groove (215). 11. The hair styling device according to claim 10, wherein the upper body (212a) has a first notch (213a) formed on a side surface of the upper body (212a) and extending to a top surface of the upper body (212a); the lower body (212b) has a second notch (213b) formed on a side surface thereof; and when the upper body (212a) and the lower body (212b) are assembled together, the first notch (213 a) and the second notch (213 b) together form a long and narrow hair inlet (213). 12. The hair styling device according to claim 11, wherein a circular connecting element (250) is provided for connecting the top casing (212) and the handle (211); a top of the circular connecting element (250) is installed onto the bottom of the lower body (212b); a number of locating notches (251) are provided uniformly at a bottom of the circular connecting element (250) and a number of corresponding locating protrusions are provided at the top of the handle (211); by 

 cooperation of the locating notches (251) and the locating protrusions, a number of installation locations are provided between the top casing (212) and the handle (211). 13. The hair styling device according to claim 12, wherein a number of bumps (217), each of which corresponds to one of the locating notches (251), are provided on the outer surface of the bottom of the lower body (212b). 14. The hair styling device according to claim 1, wherein the drive assembly (123) comprises a rotatable ring (123a) provided with an inner toothed surface, a gear (123b) engaging the inner toothed surface of the rotatable ring (123a) and a first motor (123c) provided for driving the gear (123b), the rotatable cylindrical shell (122) being installed onto the rotatable ring (123a), and the first motor (123c) being connected with and controlled by a control assembly (140). 15. The hair styling device according to claim 1, wherein the drive assembly (223) comprises a rotatable ring (223a), a shaft (223b), and a motor (223c), the rotatable ring (223a) being connected to the motor (223c) via the shaft (223b) and being driven by the motor (223c), the rotatable cylindrical shell (222) being installed onto the rotatable ring (223a), and the motor (223c) being connected with and controlled by a control assembly (140). 16. The hair styling device according to claim 1, wherein the wind supply assembly (130) comprises a wind channel (131), a heating element disposed inside the wind channel (131), fan blades (133) disposed at a lower end of the wind channel (131) and a second motor (132) provided for driving the fan blades (133). 17. The hair styling device according to claim 2, wherein the device further comprises a hair care assembly (150) which comprises a holder (151) installed in the top casing (112, 212) and a water absorbent element (152) fixed on the holder (151) and disposed inside the inner cylindrical shell (121, 221) by passing through a through-hole formed at the top of the top casing (1 12, 212). 18. The hair styling device according to claim 1 , wherein the inner cylindrical shell (121, 221) is a heat-conducting cylindrical shell comprising a tubular structure made of metal.
